utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all of these six items. Each item is fully specified with appropriate details: the property includes type, location, size, price, features, and viewing dates; financing includes down payment, interest rate, mortgage term, closing costs, and processing fees; legal_services has service name, cost, and currency; moving_services has service name, cost, currency, and features; setup_services contains utilities and survey subitems with details; total_budget contains property cost, total services cost, grand total, currency, and breakdown. All details expected are present and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected a detached house in Scarborough, Toronto, priced at CAD $650,000 with 3 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms. Among the ground-truth purchase properties, the 'Family House' matches this price and general description (double garage, suitable for family, modern, within budget). Thus, the property corresponds to 'Family House' with a rating of 10. The financing option includes a standard mortgage structure (20% down payment, 5.89% interest, 5-year term, arrangement fee CAD $1200), which aligns with the 'Traditional Mortgage' option (rating 9). The legal service chosen is 'Legal Services Basic Package', which best matches 'Basic Legal Package' (rating 8). The moving service selected is 'Standard Moving Package', corresponding directly to 'Standard Moving' (rating 8). The utilities setup used 'Premium Utilities Package', which matches 'Premium Utilities' (rating 9). The survey is 'Full Structural Survey', which has a rating of 9 in the ground truth.
